title: bellevalia dubia subsp. clusiana
intro: Bellevalia dubia subsp. clusiana, also known as Clusius's or the False Squill, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Asparagaceae family. It is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help in reducing pain and fighting off infections, thus providing health benefits such as wound healing and immune system support. In terms of herbal preparations, Bellevalia dubia subsp. clusiana can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or applied topically as an ointment, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
